title: Boss Bars: Reloaded
description: Compact boss bars for that preserve functionality while reducing UI clutter.
body:
# Boss Bars: Reloaded
*Reduces the sizes of boss bars to 1/3 their previous vanilla sizes, creating a much less intrusive GUI experience during major encounters.*

## Features
  - Significantly smaller boss bar textures for all encounters
  - Preserved functionality with minimized screen interference


## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
